title: Make.com trigger for future boards

posts.author: Moeydc (Jon Moses)
posts.cookedHtml:
good evening monday Crew,

I am looking to do a simple make.com automation on one of my template boards.

workflow = New Item created in a certain group, Make.com does the ‘search rows’ function and returns information to the board.

Does anyone know if it is possible to set this up so the make.com automation copies across to the new boards created from the template as these boards are technically in the future so cant yet be predefined?
